# Westek Electric Corp.

> Licensed electricians serving Lake Elsinore, Temecula, Murrieta & Southern California since 2010. Residential, commercial, EV charger installation, panel upgrades. 24/7 emergency service.

## Business Info

- Name: Westek Electric Corp.
- Phone: (909) 996-6678
- Email: westekelectriccompany@gmail.com
- Address: 29304 Abelia Ln., Lake Elsinore, CA 92530
- License: C10-1100272
- Website: https://socalelectricpros.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM, 24/7 Emergency Service Available

## Services

### Residential Electrical
- Appliance Wiring
- Breaker Replacement
- Ceiling Fan Installation
- Code Corrections
- Whole-House Rewiring
- Outdoor Lighting
- Indoor Lighting
- Pool & Spa Lighting
- Hot Tub, Spa, Pool & Jacuzzi Wiring
- New Construction Wiring
- Dedicated Circuits
- Landscape Lighting

### Commercial Electrical
- 1 Phase / 3 Phase Circuits
- Breakers & Fuses
- Code Corrections
- Electrical Panel Installation
- New Construction Wiring
- Outdoor Commercial Lighting
- Indoor Commercial Lighting
- Security Lighting
- Transformers
- Office Lighting
- Low Voltage Wiring
- Cat 6 Installation

### EV Charger Installation
- Tesla Wall Connector
- Ford Charge Station Pro
- Chevrolet Level 2 Chargers
- Rivian Home Charging

## Service Areas

Lake Elsinore, Temecula, Murrieta, Menifee, Wildomar, Winchester, French Valley, Fallbrook, Hemet, San Jacinto, Corona, Riverside — all of Riverside County and San Diego County, Southern California.
